title: Verify graph memory commit cycle
description: Verify that the graph memory write + commit cycle works correctly. This involves checking that episode files are created properly in .kody/graph/episodes/, nodes are correctly stored in nodes.json, and the sessions-index.json is updated when memory is committed.
existing_patterns: .kody/graph/episodes/ep_nudge_001.json - nudge episode format with id, runId, source, taskId, createdAt, rawContent, extractedNodeIds, linkedFiles
.kody/graph/nodes.json - node format with id, type, hall, room, content, episodeId, validFrom, validTo
